text.title: AC Mapping Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the ac-mapping artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: story.url missing; assertion_class not in enum; asserted_behavior too short (structural); orphan_acs non-empty; mapping_committed_at missing.

list.pattern: Any AC without at least one mapped test in `tests`.
asserted_behavior matches structural tokens like "was called", "no exception", "status 200" alone.
assertion_class set to a value outside the closed list state|output|side_effect|negative.
mapping_committed_at later than the first reviewer-request timestamp on the PR.
tests[].file_path or test_name not found in the diff or in main.
